## 🐛 Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🧭 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🔍 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 🖥️ Screenshots / Transaction logs
If applicable, add screenshots or transaction hashes to help explain your problem.

## 📱 Device Context
* OS: [e.g. iOS, Android, Windows]
* Browser / Client: [e.g. Chrome, USSD dialer, WhatsApp]
* Version: [e.g. 22]

## 🧪 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
